items.description: Explain your code to the duck. Pet happiness goes up, bugs go down.

items.name: Laser Pointer
items.description: Keeps your EEP sharp and agile. Boosts response speed.

items.description: Brushes out unused dependencies. Reduces random error rate by 15%.

items.name: XP Potion
items.description: Double XP for one full session. Stack with food buffs for max gains.

items.name: Focus Juice
items.description: Cuts incoming distractions by 50% for 3 hours. ADHD mode: activated.

items.name: Evo Accelerator
items.description: Injects 500 bonus evolution XP directly into your EEP.

items.description: Instantly resets pet energy if it hits Void status from screen-time fatigue.

items.name: DifficultyDial Precision Knob
items.description: Fine-tunes the AI Distraction Filter for higher XP sessions.
